title: Fire Alarm — Terminal 3 Retail
description: A fire alarm has been triggered in a Terminal 3 retail outlet. Smoke is visible on CCTV. Passengers are beginning to panic.

event.details: Smoke detector activated in T3 arrival hall near retail cluster — sustained alarm
Visible smoke rising from retail outlet on CCTV — passengers self-evacuating
Shouting and rapid crowd movement detected — panic spreading in arrival hall
Critical crowd density at exit points — evacuation bottleneck forming

optimal_response.primary_action: activate fire alarm and notify SCDF via 995 and ARFF simultaneously
optimal_response.secondary_action: use PA system to announce evacuation using code Red — do not say fire
optimal_response.do_not: Do not use lifts during evacuation. Do not say fire on public PA.
optimal_response.escalation: If fire spreads beyond initial zone, escalate to Level 5 and begin full terminal evacuation
